name: MurkRSS
author: Rodrigo Mescua
description: MurkRSS is a powerful RSS feed generator that combines heuristic scraping with custom CSS selectors and a visual sandbox. It allows you to generate RSS feeds for websites that don't provide them natively, featuring a point-and-click selector for easy configuration.

form_fields.label: FlareSolverr URL
form_fields.hint: URL of your FlareSolverr instance (e.g., http://flaresolverr:8191)

form_fields.label: FreshRSS URL
form_fields.hint: URL of your FreshRSS instance for native subscription links
